title: dryopteris furcata
intro: Dryopteris furcata, also known as the golden shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Dryopteris furcata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
